column1: # Acute and Chronic signatures are obtained from Cheon 2013 EMBO and Tonic signature is from Mostafavi 2016 Cell. For tonic, tonic-sensitive genes ((log2(foldchange(WT/Ifnar1KO)) > log2(foldchange(WT+IFN / WT))/4) from both B and Macrophage were converted to human symbols using g:Orth and N/A values were manually inspected to find the matching human symbols.
